title: Social Security Disability Programs and Procedures (IOM, Cardiovascular Disability, NBK209972)
description: Chapter 2 of the Institute of Medicine report 'Cardiovascular Disability: Updating the Social Security Listings' (National Academies Press, 2010), summarizing SSA's disability programs (SSDI/SSI), the statutory definition of disability, the five-step sequential evaluation process, and the role of the Listing of Impairments as an administrative expedient. Provides authoritative background on how DDS examiners adjudicate claims, including how Listings allowances versus Step-5 residual-functional-capacity decisions are made. Directly relevant to understanding the determination workflow that 509 DDS examiners follow.

source.publisher: National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI) Bookshelf / Institute of Medicine, National Academies Press (US)
source.title: Cardiovascular Disability: Updating the Social Security Listings — Chapter 2: Social Security Disability Programs and Procedures
